content:
🎃**活动时间： **
10月20日 9:00 - 12月15日 9:00（UTC+8）期间，幻衣活动「不发糖就捣蛋」限时开放。

🎃**活动内容：**
🍬该幻衣包含全新制作的动态立绘、语音、战斗模组、技能特效、迷你PV与广播剧。

🍬活动期间购买「怪味南瓜糖」可抽取以下物品，首次抽取免费。
✦ **一等奖：**4 ☆ 幻衣「糖果劫案」，从第 5 次抽取始有机会获得；
✦ **二等奖：**「流明之芯」×15、「银芯」×3000、「精粹原初灵核」×1；
✦ **三等奖：**「流明之芯」×5、「银芯」×1000、「群星余梦」×25、「碎裂余梦」×100、「原初灵核」×1、「蔷薇金券」×1000000；
✦ **第 2-10 次**抽取分别需要「怪味南瓜糖」×1/2/2/3/5/5/5/5/5 ，每颗「怪味南瓜糖」可以通过「源液」×60 购买。已抽取的奖品不会再次出现在后续抽取结果中。

🎃**皮肤PV展示：**
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1427928573737570374

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

🎃**Event Time:**
Skin Event "Trick or Treat" will be available from <t:1760922000:F> to <t:1765760400:F>

🎃**Event Details:**
🍬New Live 2D Splash Art, New Voicelines, New Combat Sprite, New Skill Visual Effects, New Mini PV, and Audio Drama!

🍬During the event, purchase "Spooky Pumpkin Candy" to enter the lottery for random prizes! Your first draw is free.
✦ **1st Prize: **4-Star Skin "Candy Snatcher". Chance to obtain begins from the 5th draw onwards.
✦ **2nd Prize: **"Luminous Core" ×15, "Silver" ×3000 , "Refined Gnosis Primer" ×1.
✦ **3rd Prize:** "Luminous Core" ×5, "Silver" ×1000, "Dreamspark" ×25, "Dreamshard" ×100, "Gnosis Primer" ×1, "Rose Scrip" ×1,000,000.
✦The **2nd-10th **draws require "Spooky Pumpkin Candy" ×1/2/2/3/5/5/5/5/5, respectively. "Spooky Pumpkin Candy" can be purchased for 60 "Silver Prime" each. Prizes already drawn will not reappear in subsequent draws.

🎃 **Skin PV:**
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1427928573737570374
@everyone
thread_title: V2.3.4 四星幻衣「墨菲·糖果劫案」，可通过幻衣活动获取！Murphy's 4-Star Skin "Candy Snatcher" Available in Special Skin Even！

content:
“可恶的弥萨格，竟敢阻拦我拿糖果！”
“哼哼，怎么样，还不是被我吃到了？🍬”

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

"Those despicable people at Mythag, daring to block my access to candy!"
"See? I still got to have them in the end! 🍬"
